# Checkmark

A standalone checkmark indicator component, used for displaying a check/indeterminate state without the full Checkbox wrapper. Useful in custom selection UIs.

## Import

```jsx
import { Checkmark } from "@onlinesales-ai/ui";
```

## Props

| Prop | Type | Default | Description |
| --- | --- | --- | --- |
| `checked` | `boolean` | `false` | Whether the checkmark is in a checked state |
| `indeterminate` | `boolean` | `false` | Whether the checkmark is in an indeterminate state |
| `disabled` | `boolean` | `false` | Whether the checkmark is disabled |
| `size` | `"xs" \| "sm" \| "md" \| "lg"` | `"md"` | The size of the checkmark |
| `variant` | `"solid" \| "outline" \| "subtle" \| "plain" \| "inverted"` | `"solid"` | The visual variant |
| `colorPalette` | `string` | - | The color palette for the checkmark |
| `filled` | `boolean` | - | Whether the checkmark has a filled background |
| `ref` | `React.Ref` | - | Forwarded ref to the underlying element |

## Usage

### Basic

```jsx
<Checkmark checked />
```

### Sizes

```jsx
<Checkmark checked size="xs" />
<Checkmark checked size="sm" />
<Checkmark checked size="md" />
<Checkmark checked size="lg" />
```

### Variants

```jsx
<Checkmark checked variant="solid" />
<Checkmark checked variant="outline" />
<Checkmark checked variant="subtle" />
<Checkmark checked variant="plain" />
<Checkmark checked variant="inverted" />
```

### Indeterminate

```jsx
<Checkmark indeterminate />
```

### Disabled

```jsx
<Checkmark checked disabled />
```

### With color palette

```jsx
<Checkmark checked colorPalette="green" />
<Checkmark checked colorPalette="red" />
```

### In a custom list

```jsx
<HStack>
  <Checkmark checked={isSelected} />
  <Text>List item label</Text>
</HStack>
```

## Features

- Standalone visual indicator without checkbox input behavior
- Supports checked, unchecked, and indeterminate states
- Multiple visual variants for different contexts
- Useful for building custom selection UIs, menus, and lists
- Forwards refs to the underlying DOM element
